feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Domincan Summer League preview
entry.content: Padres international players get the season started

entry.title: Marner's hat trick, Knights hold off Canes in 2OT, for series lead
entry.content: Shea Theodore scored at 5:38 of the second overtime and Mitch Marner recorded the fastest hat trick in Stanley Cup history.

entry.title: Oregon's Will Sanford pitching his best heading into super regional
entry.content: Oregon pitcher Will Sanford has come on strong late in the season. Can he deliver another standout performance vs. Texas with the season on the line?

entry.title: Where to watch Diamond League Stockholm: Full schedule, times, channels, live streams for 2026 track and field meet
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Diamond League Stockholm, including TV channel and streaming options for the professional track and field meet.

entry.title: Lothar Matthäus says Lennart Karl’s setback can make him stronger
entry.content: There are countless songs and sayings that use resilience as a primary theme for the old adage of “what doesn’t kill you, makes you stronger.” For Lothar Matthäus, that is extremely pertinent to Bayern Munich phenom Lennart Karl, whose World Cup dream was cut short by a torn muscle fiber. “It shocked me and I […]

entry.title: Carolina’s Historic Game 3 Rally Falls Short in Double Overtime
entry.content: “In this town, your luck can change just that quickly.“ I was inside the Lenovo Center after that abysmal second period of Thursday night. How could we feel any worse after that period? Then here comes the second period of Game 3. Time to flush it. Reset. What can the Carolina Hurricanes do to prepare […]

entry.title: 'Very happy for Shreyas Iyer': Suryakumar Yadav reacts after losing India captaincy
entry.content: Suryakumar Yadav has graciously congratulated Shreyas Iyer on his appointment as India's new T20I captain for the upcoming Ireland and England series. Despite being replaced as captain and dropped from the squad after leading India to a T20 World Cup victory, Suryakumar expressed pride in his Mumbai teammate's achievement, highlighting the strong representation from Mumbai cricket.

entry.title: UFC Fight Night Bonfim-Muhammad Results And Bonus Winners
entry.content: Gabriel Bonfim dominated Belal Muhammad 50-45 at UFC Fight Night in Las Vegas. Here are the full main card and prelim results, plus the bonus winners from the Apex.

entry.title: Simone Biles reveals she had a health scare and describes ‘almost dying’
entry.content: United States gymnastics great Simone Biles shared limited news of a health scare on Saturday, an experience she said included “almost dying.”The world’s most-decorated gymnast said on Instagram Stories that she had endured an unexpected situation, and she thanked well-wishers.“I’m not one to normally share things like this because I value privacy in today’s age,” Biles, 29, said on the social media platform.

entry.title: At least 12 shot near Ohio festival, gunmen still at large
entry.content: At least 12 people were shot Saturday when gunmen, possibly aiming for each other, opened fire near the Old West End Festival in Toledo, Ohio, police said.

entry.title: Multiple people have been shot near a festival in Toledo, Ohio, authorities say
entry.content: Multiple people were shot Saturday near a community festival in Toledo, Ohio, and police said a search for the suspects was ongoing following an outbreak of gunfire that sent people scrambling for cover.

entry.title: Cowboys trade idea sees Dallas cut ties with $136 million five-time Pro Bowl WR
entry.content: An ESPN analyst believes the Dallas Cowboys will make a significant wide receiver move next offseason.

entry.title: College baseball on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams for Saturday NCAA super regional games
entry.content: It's time to determine the eight teams that will head to Omaha for the 2026 College World Series. Here's when and where to watch all the super regional games today.

entry.title: NCAA baseball super regionals bracket, schedule, channels, live streams, scores for 2026 college tournament games
entry.content: The last stop on the road to Omaha is the super regionals. Here's when and where to watch every game.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
Do not mistake temptation for opportunity.
Lucky Numbers: 92, 99, 62, 46, 25, 66

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Freeze fresh herbs with olive oil in an ice cube tray.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: Intelligent people have more zinc and copper in their hair.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Zig Ziglar
entry.content: “A lot of people have gone further than they thought they could because someone else thought they could.” — Zig Ziglar

entry.title: NHL awards 2026: Updated list of finalists for the Hart, Norris, Vezina, Calder & more
entry.content: Here are each of the finalists for NHL's end-of-season awards, from the Hart Trophy to the Jack Adams.

entry.title: How New England Patriots trade for A.J. Brown could backfire
entry.content: New England gave up a first-round pick to acquire Brown from Philadelphia.

entry.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire as stalemate continues in peace talks
entry.content: The U.S. military reported that it shot down four Iranian one-way attack drones headed toward the Strait of Hormuz overnight Saturday local time, while seven ballistic missiles fired at Kuwait and Bahrain were largely intercepted as well.

entry.title: Treasury Department plans to use Iranian assets to help U.S. Gulf allies recover
entry.content: The Treasury Department will use Iranian assets to help U.S. Gulf allies recover from damage caused by Tehran's regime, a source familiar with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's thinking told CBS News.

entry.title: Auburn vs. Ole Miss baseball box score: Live stats from NCAA Baseball Championship Game 2
entry.content: The Rebels will try to advance in the Auburn Super Regional.

entry.title: Eagles cut ties with rookie WR after A.J. Brown deal
entry.content: The Philadelphia Eagles moved on from another wide receiver on Friday.

entry.content: The Jayhawks open up the Super Regional against the Sooners.

entry.title: Aaron Judge's injury explanation has Yankees fans asking the same question
entry.content: Aaron Judge revealed he played through a stress fracture in his rib for more than a month before landing on the injured list, leaving Yankees fans questioning the decision.

entry.title: England top scorers of all time: Complete list of most goals with Harry Kane, Wayne Rooney, Gary Lineker and legends
entry.content: Harry Kane always looked destined to break the all-time England record, and did so in 2023 with his goal against Italy in the Euro 2024 qualifier.

entry.title: Senate fails to extend key surveillance program as deadline nears
entry.content: A procedural vote failed in the Senate early Friday, and a provision of the spy powers law is set to expire June 12.

entry.title: Does it mean anything that Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown listed his home for sale?
entry.content: Could it be that Brown is soon to be dealt to bring on Bucks star Giannis or Pelicans rising prospect Tre Murphy? Perhaps -- but we doubt it.

entry.title: Trump Swoons Over Football Hall Of Famer’s Physique: ‘Hell Of A Physical Specimen’
entry.content: "I don’t know who the hell he is, but he is one hell of a specimen," the president said of former NFL player Joe Thomas.

entry.title: Bruno Fernandes and Gonçalo Guedes Fire Portugal Past Chile

entry.title: Iran soccer team departs for Mexico ahead of World Cup
entry.content: Problems with processing visas had earlier led Iran to move its training base from Tucson, Arizona, to Tijuana, Mexico.

entry.title: Jared Kushner-backed luxury resort stokes days of protests in Albania
entry.content: The so-called "Flamingo Revolution" has taken up the cause of protecting the Albanian coast from a development led by the president's son-in-law.

entry.title: Zachary Schrader's clutch goal gives Gilbert boys another state title
entry.content: A clutch goal from Zachary Schrader in the final three minutes gives Gilbert a repeat 2A boys state soccer title with a 1-0 win over DMC.

entry.title: Delaware's Landon Green is Dispatch regular-season baseball player of year
entry.content: Dispatch.com readers voted for Delaware Hayes' Landon Green as the regular-season baseball player of the year.

entry.title: KL Rahul's patience, Shubman Gill's flair leave Afghanistan chasing shadows as India finish at 368/3 on Day 1
entry.content: India seized control on day one against Afghanistan, reaching a formidable 368 for 3. Centuries from KL Rahul and Shubman Gill, showcasing contrasting styles, anchored the innings. Sai Sudharsan's 81 and Rishabh Pant's unbeaten 50 further solidified India's dominance, leaving Afghanistan's bowlers struggling.

entry.title: Maple Leafs, Canucks make opposite NHL Draft decisions on Ivar Stenberg
entry.content: Toronto and Vancouver are aiming in different directions.

entry.title: Richard Childress compares pain of losing Kyle Busch to Dale Earnhardt’s death
entry.content: Richard Childress had hoped to announce a contract extension for Kyle Busch at Michigan International Speedway. Instead, the longtime owner of Richard Childress Racing held a news conference Saturday at the track to publicly address the unexpected death of Kyle Busch for the first time since the two-time Cup Series champion died on May 21 after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis. For Childress, whose NASCAR team weathered the loss of seven-time champion Dale Earnhardt in a fatal crash at the 2001 Daytona 500, the ache was all too familiar.

entry.title: Derrick White shares his view on whether the Boston Celtics 2025-26 season was a failure
entry.content: "I think we definitely did a lot of things, especially going into year, nobody really knew what type of year we were going to have," said White.

entry.title: The Best Strategy to Use When Buying IPO Stocks

entry.title: What does the Golden Knights' 'unsung hero' have in store for Game 3 of the NHL Stanley Cup Final?
entry.content: Brett Howden has become the ‘unsung hero’ for the Vegas Golden Knights during the 2025-26 Stanley Cup playoffs, and with a big Game 3 of the NHL Stanley Cup Final, the Golden Knights will be turning to him again for more offense.

entry.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
entry.content: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

entry.title: Lil Yachty set for Belmont Stakes as Vitruvian Man takes Triple Crown shot
entry.content: Vitruvian Man is the longest shot in Saturday's field at 30-1, but Lil Yachty is flying to Saratoga anyway to watch the colt he backs with Lil Wayne run.

entry.title: New study casts doubt on reliability of mental health diagnosis interviews
entry.content: Diagnostic interviews seen as ‘gold standard’ vary in reliability from condition to condition, study saysDiagnostic interviews – the most common way to diagnose substance use and mental disorders including depression, anxiety, bipolar and personality disorders – vary in reliability from condition to condition, according to a new study in Jama Network Open.Laura Duncan, a psychiatry professor at McMaster University in Ontario, Canada, and one of the study’s authors, said diagnostic interviews are “often treated as a ‘gold standard’ for assessing mental disorders in both clinical settings and research”, but pointed out that these interviews fall short of providing a “definitive benchmark that demonstrates excellent validity and reliability”. Continue reading...
